subcodes.first_line: O ye blessed souls! Many assemblies are formed and organized in this world… Assembly means the diffusion of the fragrances of God.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مبارکه محافل در هر دیار موجود و آشکار ولی نام این محفل آرزوی اهل دل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @humility; meekness; lowliness
